zh.lifeSummary: 當Giles de Braose於1268年出生在英國素可布拉波時，他的父親William de Braose44歲，母親Agnes de Moels29歲。他於大約1288年與Beatrice de St Helena結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1305年1月7日之前，埋葬在英國多瑟特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Giles de Braose于1268年出生在英国素可布拉波时，他的父亲William de Braose44岁，母亲Agnes de Moels29岁。他于大约1288年与Beatrice de St Helena结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1305年1月7日之前，埋葬在英国多瑟特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Braose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Eckhard, Gerhard, Manfred, Otto.
from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Ambrosius (see Ambrose ).

variants.name: Ambrose
meanings: English and Scottish: from the personal name Ambrose (French Ambroise, Latin Ambrosius, from Greek ambrosios ‘immortal, divine’), which was popular throughout Christendom in medieval Europe. Its popularity was due in part to the fame of Saint Ambrose (c. 340–397), one of the four Latin Fathers of the Church, the teacher of Saint Augustine. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech, Slovenian, and Croatian Ambrož (see Ambroz ), and also their derivatives, e.g. the Slovenian patronymic Ambrožič.
Irish: from Mac Ambróis ‘son of Ambrose’ (see 1 above); a West Munster name, which has also been Anglicized as McCambridge .

nameMeanings.name: Giles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Much altered English vernacular form of the Late Latin name Aegidius, from Greek Aigidios (a derivative of aigidion ‘kid, young goat’), via Old French Gide. It was the name of an 8th‐century saint who, according to tradition, was an Athenian citizen who fled to Provence because he could not cope with the fame and adulation caused by his power to work miracles, in particular by healing the lame and crippled. This was not a particularly common name in the Middle Ages and its use seems to have been confined to certain families and localities.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Giles de Braose was born in 1268, in Bramber, Sussex, England, his father, William de Braose, was 44 and his mother, Agnes de Moels, was 29. He married Beatrice de St Helena about 1288. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died before 7 January 1305, and was buried in Dorset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Giles de Braose est né en 1268, à Bramber, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, William de Braose, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Moels, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Beatrice de St Helena environ 1288. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 7 janvier 1305, et a été enterré à Dorset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Giles de Braose 1268 in Bramber, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Braose 44 und seine Mutter Agnes de Moels 29. Er hat um 1288 Beatrice de St Helena geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 7. Januar 1305 und wurde in Dorset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Giles de Braose è nato il nel 1268 nel Bramber, Sussex, England, il suo padre, William de Braose, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Moels, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Beatrice de St Helena circa 1288. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì prima del 7 gennaio 1305, e fu sepolto a Dorset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Giles de Braoseが1268年にイギリススセックスブランバーで生まれた時，父William de Braoseは44歳，母Agnes de Moelsは29歳であった。約1288年にBeatrice de St Helenaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1305年1月7日以前に死去し，イギリスドールセトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Giles de Braose(이)가 1268년 영국 수세스 브램버에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Braose(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Moels(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1288년 Beatrice de St Helena(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1305년 1월 7일 이전 사망했으며 영국 도르세트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Giles de Braose nasceu em 1268, em Bramber, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Braose, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Moels, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrice de St Helena aproximadamente 1288. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes 7 de janeiro de 1305, e foi sepultado em Dorset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Giles de Braose родился в 1268 г. в местности брэмбир, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Braose было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Moels, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrice de St Helena около 1288 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер перед 7 январь 1305 г. и был похоронен в местности дорсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Giles de Braose nació en 1268, en Bramber, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Braose, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Agnes de Moels, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Beatrice de St Helena aproximadamente 1288. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió antes de 7 de enero de 1305, y fue sepultado en Dorset, Inglaterra.
